movie.actors: Rutger Hauer, Terry O'Quinn, Brandon Call, Noble Willingham
movie.plot: A blind Vietnam vet, trained as a swordfighter, comes to America and helps to rescue the son of a fellow soldier.
movie.title: Blind Fury
movie.writer: Ryôzô Kasahara (earlier screenplay), Charles Robert Carner (screen story), Charles Robert Carner (screenplay)
